title: ResourcePack to Mod Lib (RPtMLib)
description: this is a library mod for Resource Pack to Mod. which is a mod that allows you to turn your resource packs to a mod.
body: # 📦 ResourcePack to Mod Library (RPtMLib) RPtM is a lightweight Fabric utility that lets you bundle multiple resource packs directly into a single mod JAR. It uses the `registerBuiltinResourcePack` API to register assets as "Built-in" packs. You can use [RPtM Converter](https://rptm.pages.dev/) to turn your resource packs to mods. All generated mods will be needing this library mod. In Modrinth people tend to download mods over datapacks and resource packs. So i build that mod for people who suffer from that. --- ### 🛠️ Why use this? * **Internal Loading:** Packaged assets stay inside the JAR—no more messy folders. * **Automatic Detection:** If any RPtM mod is installed it will work without hustle. * **Version Agnostic:** Built to work on **1.20+**. * **Zero Bloat:** No heavy dependencies or performance hits. * **Mod Compatibility:** Works with **[Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)** natively. * **Open Source:** Both [RPtMLib](https://github.com/Runteryaa/RPtM) and [RPtM Converter](https://github.com/Runteryaa/RPtM-Converter) source code available on [GitHub](https://github.com/Runteryaa/RPtM). --- ### 🗺️ TODO * ... --- ### 🚀 Quick-Start 1. Go to [RPtM Converter](https://rptm.pages.dev/) website. 2. Upload your resource pack. 3. Fill in the blanks about your mod. 4. Click "Convert to Mod". 5. Drag-n-drop to your mods folder. (make sure you have RPtMLib installed) 6. DONE!
